pages.text: Tomorrow is Mina’s birthday. She is having a party in the garden.

blocks.text: Tomorrow is Mina’s birthday. She is having a party in the garden.

pages.text: Mina is going to the shops with Mum to buy a birthday dress.

blocks.text: Mina is going to the shops with Mum to buy a birthday dress.

pages.text: “I want a blue dress,” Mina says. Mum finds a lovely blue dress.

blocks.text: “I want a blue dress,” Mina says. Mum finds a lovely blue dress.

pages.text: Mina shakes her head. “I don’t want a blue dress.”

blocks.text: Mina shakes her head. “I don’t want a blue dress.”

pages.text: “I want a pink dress,” Mina says. Mum shows her a beautiful pink dress.

blocks.text: “I want a pink dress,” Mina says. Mum shows her a beautiful pink dress.

pages.text: Mina folds her arms. “I don’t want a pink dress.”

blocks.text: Mina folds her arms. “I don’t want a pink dress.”

pages.text: “I want a green dress,” Mina says. Mum holds out a pretty green dress.

blocks.text: “I want a green dress,” Mina says. Mum holds out a pretty green dress.

pages.text: Mina frowns. “I don’t want a green dress.”

blocks.text: Mina frowns. “I don’t want a green dress.”

pages.text: Mum says, “You don’t want a blue dress, you don’t want a pink dress and you don’t want a green dress.”

blocks.text: Mum says, “You don’t want a blue dress, you don’t want a pink dress and you don’t want a green dress.”

pages.text: Mina says, “Yes! I love yellow. I want the yellow dress.”

blocks.text: Mina says, “Yes! I love yellow. I want the yellow dress.”
